title: cassia glandulosa var. stricta
intro: Cassia glandulosa var. stricta, also known as Cassia auriculata var. stricta, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family, Fabaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, known for its medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cassia glandulosa var. stricta include lowering blood sugar levels, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of various respiratory and skin conditions. Cassia glandulosa var. stricta can be prepared into herbal remedies such as decoctions, infusions, and capsules, which are often used to treat various health issues.
